name: hover-engine-host
//: host.mjs is spawned by the extension under plain node. `node_modules/` here is GENERATED by scripts/stage-engine.mjs (a flat npm install of @hover-dev/core) and shipped inside the .vsix — it is gitignored. See docs §3.6 (Path A).
//overrides: The engine runs under VSCode's Electron-Node (often Node 20.x, < 22.12) where require() of an ESM module throws ERR_REQUIRE_ESM. mockttp@4 does require('get-port'); get-port is ESM from v6 onward (v6 + v7 both have type:module), so it fails to load and the MITM proxy (api-test/pentest control plane) never boots. Pin get-port to 5.1.1 — the LAST CJS release — so require() works on any Node. Also pin @peculiar/asn1-schema to one copy (its schema registry breaks across duplicates). stage-engine's npm install reads these overrides.
